plugins.name: openclaw-langsmith-trace
plugins.description: LangSmith tracing for OpenClaw agent turns, inner LLM calls, tool calls, and subagents. Built on the official langsmith SDK.

plugins.name: self-learn
plugins.description: Enables the agent to autonomously create, update, and manage reusable skills from experience

plugins.name: openclaw-unipile
plugins.description: LinkedIn automation via Unipile (messaging, connections, profile, Sales Navigator search) with enforced daily quotas and human-like pacing

plugins.name: openclaw-instantly
plugins.description: Receives Instantly.ai webhooks, authenticates via a custom header, and creates a TaskFlow per event for downstream agent handling

plugins.name: copilotai-email-warden
plugins.description: Email Warden for OpenClaw, a plugin that monitors email activity and adds a layer of protection for sending cold emails so that your account doesn't get banned or blacklisted.

plugins.name: composio-plus
plugins.description: Per-user Composio access for OpenClaw via the TypeScript SDK. Exposes the six Composio meta-tools (search, schemas, multi-execute, manage-connections, workbench, bash) and supports custom tools, custom toolkits, and custom auth configs.
